# Q 

2 

M 

BATHE

## Exterior / maintenance

### pH neutral shampoo for safe and effective washing.

Q²M Bathe is a highly concentrated, pH-neutral car shampoo formulated for safe and effective cleaning. Its thin gel consistency easily dissolves dirt while being gentle on paint, coatings, and sealants. It generates rich foam and offers excellent lubrication during washing.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_bathe_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Slick, concentrated and pH-neutral shampoo.’

Q²M Bathe helps reduce the risk of wash induced defects by improving glove glide and minimising friction on the paint surface. It cleans efficiently while preserving protective layers and delicate finishes.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons26.svg)

HIGH SUDS 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons49.svg)

PH NEUTRAL 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons70.svg)

SLICKNESS FOR A SMOOTH WASH 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mbathe.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

PH LEVEL

6

DILUTION

1:500

Consumption

15-20ml/car

DILUTION

1:500

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

BATHE

01
Rinse the vehicle thoroughly to remove loose dirt. 

02
Dilute Q²M Bathe according to the recommended ratio. 

03
Wash using a soft wash mitt and proper technique. 

04
Rinse thoroughly with clean water. 

05
Dry the vehicle using a suitable drying towel. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M Bathe safe for ceramic coated cars? 

Yes. It is pH neutral and safe for coatings and sealants.

02
Does it remove protection from the paint? 

No. It cleans effectively without degrading protective layers.

03
Why is lubrication important in a shampoo? 

Higher lubrication reduces friction and lowers the risk of paint defects.

04
Can it be used on all exterior finishes? 

Yes. It is safe for chrome, polished metals, sensitive surfaces and all possible exterior automotive surfaces.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000255517-Q-M-Bathe)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
